publication_targets.name: GitHub release
publication_targets.reason: Requires maintainer tag, changelog, and release approval.

publication_targets.name: Hugging Face dataset
publication_targets.reason: Requires credentials, terms review, and source-content boundary review.

publication_targets.name: Zenodo or OSF deposit
publication_targets.reason: Requires registry metadata review and operator publication.

publication_targets.name: Live archive/source refresh
publication_targets.reason: Requires live source availability and source snapshot capture.

rights_notice: MIT applies to code, schemas, ontology, examples, and documentation in this repository. Source FYI/archive content retains its original rights and platform terms and is not republished by this release package.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests scripts
uv run ruff format --check src tests scripts
